The '''Iotran Police Force''', or '''IPF''', was the leading military and [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|police force]] on [[Iotra]]. The top eight members of IPF made up the [[Joint Council]], the lead ruling body of Iotran.<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />

It was formed seven hundred years before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] by consolidating various military orders, including the [[Kilandran Royal Forces]], the [[Lurathi Guard]], and the [[Jengardin Millennial Warriors]]. They handled all the civic duties in the [[Iotran Expanse/Legends|Iotran Territories]], including disaster relief, law enforcement, fire fighting, and emergency medical services. All Iotrans were required to serve in the force, giving them a large reserve of highly trained personnel available for use.<ref name="P&P" />

They were also hired out to corporations and other governments as a source of income for the [[Iotran/Legends|Iotrans]]. The force would patrol other [[Star system/Legends|systems]] and took any infractions to local law as serious as offenses in the Iotran Territories.<ref name="P&P" />
